name: autoform
description: Turn any AI coding assistant into a Lean 4 formalization agent. Mathlib conventions, proof strategies, review checklists, and statement extraction — distilled from 94k PR reviews.

autoform-repl.description: Lean 4 REPL — run code, verify proofs, check compilation

autoform-mathlib.description: Mathlib source search — grep, find by name, read files

autoform-lsp.description: Lean 4 LSP — file diagnostics and type information

autoform-trace.description: Execution tracing — record proof attempts, steps, reviews

autoform-aristotle.description: Aristotle (Harmonic) — delegate formalization to an autonomous prover
